slices.summary: Capture omx setup --dry-run text plus follow-up project-scope setup artifact expectations before native cutover.

commands.notes: Keep output assertions scoped to stable summary lines such as resolved scope and dry-run messaging.
Run in a temp repo and compare project-root file-tree artifacts rather than terminal text.
Run in a temp repo with a seeded project AGENTS.md and compare HOME-scoped artifacts plus project AGENTS.md preservation.

artifact_assertions: .codex/prompts/ exists under cwd for project scope
.agents/skills/ exists under cwd for project scope
project AGENTS.md is generated for project scope and preserved for user scope

slices.summary: Capture deterministic omx doctor --team warning/failure families using controlled fixture directories and fake tmux binaries.

commands.notes: Fixture should synthesize missing tmux session state and assert resume_blocker output plus exit code 1.
Fixture should synthesize working worker + stale heartbeat and assert delayed_status_lag output plus exit code 1.
Fixture should fake an unattributed tmux session and assert orphan_tmux_session warning output with exit code 0.

artifact_assertions: workers/<worker>/status.json and heartbeat.json fixture data preserved for the targeted issue

slices.summary: Capture session-scoped status/cancel behavior and team status snapshots without depending on unstable live tmux output.

commands.notes: Fixture should seed .omx/state/session.json plus sessions/<id>/team-state.json and assert the stable team: ACTIVE summary line.
Fixture should assert Cancelled: team and verify the state file flips to inactive/cancelled with completed_at set.
Fixture should compare phase/task-count summary lines from monitorTeam-backed output instead of raw runtime logs.

artifact_assertions: team status fixture includes deterministic task and worker counts
